subject: feat(menu): add manual update check, remove source code link
body:
PWA in standalone mode has no browser refresh button, so users had no way
to check for updates except waiting for the 60-minute automatic poll.
Added "Check for updates" menu item that triggers SW registration.update()
with toast feedback. Removed "Source code" GitHub link — not useful for
non-technical end users.

Tags: pwa, ux, menu
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa
Semver: minor

title: add manual update check, remove source code link
